anchor: If the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius at sea level, then it boils.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If the water reaches 100 degrees Celsius at sea level, then it boils.
(r / reach-01
   :ARG0 w
   :ARG1 (t / temperature-quantity
            :quant 100
            :scale (c / celsius))
   :location (l / level
                :mod (s / sea))
   :condition (b / boil-01
                 :polarity -
                 :ARG1 (w / water))
   :polarity -)
positive: If the water does not boil, then it does not reach 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.

anchor: If Mary owns a car, then she has a driver's license.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If Mary owns a car, then she has a driver's license.
(h / have-condition-91
   :ARG1 (o / own-01
            :polarity -
            :ARG0 p
            :ARG1 (c / car))
   :ARG2 (l / license-01
            :polarity -
            :ARG1 (d / drive-01
                     :ARG0 (p / person
                              :name (n / name
                                       :op1 "Mary")))
            :ARG2 p))
positive: If Mary does not have a driver's license, then she does not own a car.

anchor: If a patient takes the medication and follows the doctor's instructions, then they recover within two weeks.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If a patient takes the medication and follows the doctor's instructions, then they recover within two weeks.
(a2 / and
    :op1 (t2 / take-01
             :ARG0 p
             :ARG1 (m / medication))
    :op2 (f / follow-02
            :ARG0 p
            :ARG1 (ii / instruct-01
                      :ARG0 (d / doctor)
                      :ARG1 p))
    :condition (r / recover-01
                  :polarity -
                  :ARG1 (p / patient)
                  :time (a / after
                           :quant (u / up-to
                                     :op1 (t / temporal-quantity
                                             :quant 2
                                             :unit (w / week)))))
    :polarity -)
positive: If a patient does not recover within two weeks, then they did not take the medication or did not follow the doctor's instructions.

anchor: It is not the case that Alice is tall and Bob is short.
amr_positive:

(c / case-04
   :ARG1 (a / or
            :op1 (t / tall
                    :domain (p / person
                               :name (n / name
                                        :op1 "Alice"))
                    :polarity -)
            :op2 (s / short-07
                    :ARG1 (p2 / person
                              :name (n2 / name
                                        :op1 "Bob"))
                    :polarity -)))
positive: Alice is not tall or Bob is not short.

anchor: Neither the manager nor the assistant attended the meeting.
amr_positive:

   :ARG0 (a2 / or

                     :polarity -)
             :op2 (p2 / person
                      :ARG0-of (a3 / assist-01)

positive: The manager did not attend the meeting and the assistant did not attend the meeting.

anchor: If every employee submits their timesheet, then payroll is processed.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If every employee submits their timesheet, then payroll is processed.
(s / submit-01
   :ARG0 (p3 / person
             :ARG1-of (e / employ-01)
             :mod (e2 / every))
   :ARG1 (t / timesheet
            :poss p3)
   :condition (p / process-01
                 :polarity -
                 :ARG1 (p2 / payroll)
                 :time (t2 / then))
   :polarity -)
positive: If payroll is not processed, then some employee did not submit their timesheet.

anchor: If a country produces more goods than it consumes, it exports the surplus to trading partners.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If a country produces more goods than it consumes, it exports the surplus to trading partners.
(p2 / produce-01
    :ARG0 (c3 / country)
    :ARG1 (g / good
             :ARG1-of (h / have-quant-91
                         :ARG3 (m / more)
                         :ARG4 (g2 / good
                                   :ARG1-of (c4 / consume-01
                                                :ARG0 c3))))
    :condition (e / export-01
                  :polarity -
                  :ARG0 (c / country)
                  :ARG1 (s / surplus)
                  :ARG2 (c2 / country
                            :ARG0-of (p / partner-01
                                        :ARG1 c
                                        :mod (t / trade-01))))
    :polarity -)
positive: If a country does not export the surplus to trading partners, then it does not produce more goods than it consumes.

anchor: If a software vulnerability is reported and the patch is delayed, then the system is at risk and the security team must be notified.
amr_positive:
# ::snt If a software vulnerability is reported and the patch is delayed, then the system is at risk and the security team must be notified.
(a2 / and
    :op1 (r2 / report-01
             :ARG1 (v / vulnerability
                      :mod (s3 / software)))
    :op2 (d / delay-01
            :ARG1 (p / patch-01))
    :condition (a / and
                  :polarity -
                  :op1 (r / risk-01
                          :ARG2 (s / system))
                  :op2 (o / obligate-01
                          :ARG2 (n / notify-01
                                   :ARG1 (t / team
                                            :ARG0-of (s2 / secure-02)))))
    :polarity -)
positive: If the system is not at risk or the security team need not be notified, then either no software vulnerability is reported or the patch is not delayed.
